allow: Bash(PRISMA_USER_CONSENT_FOR_DANGEROUS_AI_ACTION="haa reset karo" npx prisma migrate reset --force)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'node_modules/.cache' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'node_modules/.cache' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")
